Päivä一日 Seremonia式 Musiikki音楽 Vastaanotto披露宴 Paikat地図 Vihkikaava式次第 Atlântida蜜月
Honeymoon score · 映画音楽

Atlântida

São Miguel & Pico — a small score in five movements
February 2027 · five movements

One melody, five lives. The opening theme is born as longing, sinks into the deep, is found again, rises from the sea — and at last comes home, at peace. Atlantis is not a home lost but a home risen: ours, found after we had each been so long adrift. ひとつの旋律、五つの姿。失われ、沈み、再び見いだされ、海から昇り、そして光のうちに家へ帰る。

I
Ponta Delgada
I

Ponta Delgada

Arrival · title theme

The longing of finding home — beautiful, nostalgic, powerful.

D minor → D major 70 BPM 2:48
bittersweetnostalgicbeautifulpowerfullonginghomecoming
II
Sete Cidades
II

Sete Cidades

The deep · adrift

The long time lost — home beneath the water, glimpsed but out of reach.

D Dorian 64 BPM 3:09
ambient stringsmodalvastlonelyyearning
III
Furnas
III

Furnas

The intimate heart · being found

Fragile and deep — the lost melody found again, close and whole.

F major 66 BPM 2:04
intimatefragilesparseachingfelt piano
IV
Pico
IV

Pico

The awe climax · the sunken home rises

A lone voice calls from the deep, and the ancient home breaks the surface.

D minor → F major 68 BPM 2:37
dark to triumphantancientmonolithiclone mezzoimmense
V
Reprise
V

Ponta Delgada — Reprise

Departure · the theme home for good

The same melody, matured and settled — viola and cello, the longing at peace.

D major 68 BPM 2:38
maturedsettledviola & celloat peaceending in light

Mira & Mikael · honeymoon 2027

We were each long adrift, and found our way home in one another.
